meta.title: The Realignment - Ep. 10: Rebeccah Heinrichs, Trump’s Foreign Policy Explained
meta.description:
Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Rebeccah Heinrichs breaks down Trump’s worldview and explains why his foreign policy is better for American interests and security than the Obama doctrine.   

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
